title: PanelAutoMeshByPointsOnEdges
description: PanelAutoMeshByPointsOnEdges: Divide the panel based on points coincident with the panel edges.

PointOnEdgeFromLine.description: If this is True, points on the area object edges are determined from intersections of straight line objects included in the group specified by the Group item with the area object edges.

PointOnEdgeFromPoint.description: If this is True, points on the area object edges are determined from point objects included in the group specified by the Group item that lie on the area object edges.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
